parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const item = $json; const now = new Date().toISOString(); const fileContent = Buffer.from($('Fetch File from Gitea').first().json.content, 'base64').toString('utf8'); const updated = fileContent.replace(/^(processing_started:\s*).*$/m, `$1"${now}"`).replace(/^(processing_updated:\s*).*$/m, `$1"${now}"`).replace(/^(current_agent:\s*).*$/m, `$1"router"`); return JSON.stringify({ message: `chore(sdlc): mark ${item.id} processing_started`, content: Buffer.from(updated).toString('base64'), sha: item.fileSha, author: { name: 'sdlc-bot', email: 'sdlc-bot@7rb.nl' }, committer: { name: 'sdlc-bot', email: 'sdlc-bot@7rb.nl' } }); })() }}

parameters.text: =💥 Deploy gefaald: {{ $('Deduplication Check').first().json.id }} — menselijke actie vereist

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: `chore(queue): enqueue ${$json.item_id}`, content: $json.content, sha: $json.sha, author: { name: 'sdlc-bot', email: 'sdlc-bot@7rb.nl' }, committer: { name: 'sdlc-bot', email: 'sdlc-bot@7rb.nl' } }) }}
